actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: The organisers of the Boardmasters festival have announced they are taking a year off.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Police in Coleraine have uncovered a cannabis farm in the town.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: A man has appeared in court charged with murdering a man in Renfrewshire.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: England defender Chris Smalling says he is "fine" after receiving treatment on his knee before training.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Reading have held talks with former Chelsea and Atletico Madrid manager Javier Pantic about becoming their new manager.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Former Fifa vice-president Jack Warner has been banned from football for life.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: France won the Olympic men's fours gold medal in Rio, beating Hungary in the final.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Rovers have signed striker Brett Williams from Forest Green on a two-year deal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Swindon Town have signed former Coventry City defender Jordan Turnbull on a two-year deal.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: Brighton have signed Republic of Ireland international defender Shane Duffy from Blackburn Rovers for an undisclosed fee.
